description_long: This object is a sliced steak, arranged in a fanned-out presentation with a prominent bone-in section at the center. The steak slices display a juicy, pinkish-red interior with a seared, browned crust on the outside, indicating a freshly cooked cut. The bone is thick and darkened, likely from the cooking process, and serves as a central anchor for the slices. The surface of the steak glistens with rendered fat and meat juices, giving it a glossy, appetizing appearance. There are no visible garnishes or side items, and the steak is presented alone, emphasizing its rich marbling and texture. The overall look suggests a high-quality cut, possibly a ribeye or T-bone, cooked to a medium rare doneness.
description: A sliced, bone-in steak with a glossy, seared crust and juicy, pink interior, arranged in a fanned-out display. The steak features visible marbling and a prominent central bone.
description_view_0: This view highlights the thick bone and the juicy, pink interior of the steak slices, with the glossy surface and seared edges clearly visible.
description_view_1: From this angle, the underside of the steak and the dark, seared crust are more prominent, with less emphasis on the pink interior.
description_view_2: This perspective showcases the bone extending outward and the arrangement of the steak slices, with the seared exterior and marbling visible.
description_view_3: The fanned arrangement of the steak slices is most apparent here, with the pink, juicy interiors and glossy surface standing out.
attribute_grill_marks: Grill marks are faint and not prominently visible, with no clear crosshatch or parallel pattern.
attribute_visible_fat_marbling: Moderate fat marbling is visible, with the marbling distributed fairly evenly throughout the steak slices.
